requirement_topic.en: US Market Access — Distributed Certification Framework (NRTL + FCC + DoE + CEC + USB-IF)
requirement_topic.zh: 美国市场准入 — 分散认证体系（NRTL + FCC + DoE + CEC + USB-IF）
requirement_topic.zht: 美國市場準入 — 分散認證體系（NRTL + FCC + DoE + CEC + USB-IF）

summary.en: There is no single federal safety mark for consumer chargers sold in the United States. Market access requires satisfying a stack of independent requirements administered by separate bodies. (1) Safety — NRTL listing from an OSHA-recognised Nationally Recognised Testing Laboratory (e.g. UL, Intertek, TUV Rheinland) against UL 62368-1 (Audio/Video, Information and Communication Technology Equipment safety standard, which covers USB chargers and power adapters); retailers and online marketplaces contractually require NRTL evidence before listing a product. (2) RF/EMC — FCC Supplier's Declaration of Conformity (SDoC) under 47 CFR Part 15 (unintentional radiators); for chargers with intentional radio emitters (Wi-Fi, Bluetooth) an FCC ID grant of equipment authorisation is also required. (3) Energy efficiency — DoE Level VI (10 CFR Part 430 Subpart B Appendix Z) for external power supplies; compliance must be tested by a DoE-recognised laboratory and units enrolled in the DoE Compliance Certification Database before import or sale. GaN chargers with multiple ports may be subject to DoE multi-port external power supply rulemaking — verify current applicability at energy.gov/eere. (4) California Energy Commission (CEC) registration — California Title 20 (20 CCR §§ 1601–1608) requires external power supplies sold or offered for sale in California to be registered in the CEC Modernised Appliance Efficiency Database System (MAEDbS) before sale; as the largest US state market, this is a practical national requirement for consumer electronics chargers. (5) USB-IF Certification — for chargers implementing USB Power Delivery (USB PD) or Programmable Power Supply (PPS) via USB-C, the USB Implementers Forum (USB-IF) offers voluntary product certification under the USB Type-C and USB PD specifications; major retailers (Amazon, Best Buy, Apple authorised channel) and mobile OEMs contractually require USB-IF certification as a de facto commercial gate. GaN fast chargers sold for mobile devices typically carry the USB-IF certified mark. (6) Marketplace compliance — Amazon and major US retailers require sellers to upload NRTL test reports, FCC SDoC or FCC ID, DoE compliance documentation, and USB-IF certification before listing charger products; failure to provide these results in listing removal.
summary.zh: 美国对消费级充电器没有统一的联邦安全标志。市场准入须满足由独立机构分别管理的多项要求叠加。（1）安全性——须获得经OSHA认可的国家认可测试实验室（NRTL，如UL、Intertek、TUV莱茵）颁发的UL 62368-1（音频/视频、信息和通信技术设备安全标准，涵盖USB充电器和电源适配器）上市认证；零售商和网络市场在上架产品前均合同性要求提供NRTL证明。（2）射频/EMC——须依据47 CFR第15部分（非故意辐射装置）提交FCC供应商符合性声明（SDoC）；含故意无线电发射装置（Wi-Fi、蓝牙）的充电器还须取得FCC设备授权编号（FCC ID）。（3）能效——外接电源须符合DoE VI级要求（10 CFR第430部分附录Z）；须经DoE认可实验室测试，并在进口或销售前在DoE合规认证数据库中完成登记。多接口GaN充电器可能受DoE多接口外接电源新规约束——请访问energy.gov/eere核实当前适用情况。（4）加利福尼亚州能源委员会（CEC）注册——加州第20号令（20 CCR §§ 1601–1608）要求在加州销售或拟在加州销售的外接电源须在CEC现代化家电能效数据系统（MAEDbS）中完成注册；作为美国最大的州级市场，这实际上是消费电子充电器的全国性要求。（5）USB-IF认证——对于采用USB Type-C接口实现USB Power Delivery（USB PD）或可编程电源（PPS）的充电器，USB实施者论坛（USB-IF）根据USB Type-C及USB PD规范提供自愿性产品认证；主要零售商（亚马逊、Best Buy、苹果授权渠道）和手机OEM厂商合同性要求USB-IF认证，已成为事实上的商业准入门槛。面向移动设备的GaN快充通常带有USB-IF认证标志。（6）市场平台合规——亚马逊和主要美国零售商要求卖家在上架充电器产品前上传NRTL测试报告、FCC SDoC或FCC ID、DoE合规文件及USB-IF认证；未能提供上述资料将导致产品下架。
summary.zht: 美國對消費級充電器沒有統一的聯邦安全標誌。市場準入須滿足由獨立機構分別管理的多項要求疊加。（1）安全性——須獲得經OSHA認可的國家認可測試實驗室（NRTL，如UL、Intertek、TUV萊茵）頒發的UL 62368-1（音頻/視頻、資訊和通訊技術設備安全標準，涵蓋USB充電器和電源適配器）上市認證；零售商和網絡市場在上架產品前均合同性要求提供NRTL證明。（2）射頻/EMC——須依據47 CFR第15部分（非故意輻射裝置）提交FCC供應商符合性聲明（SDoC）；含故意無線電發射裝置（Wi-Fi、藍牙）的充電器還須取得FCC設備授權編號（FCC ID）。（3）能效——外接電源須符合DoE VI級要求（10 CFR第430部分附錄Z）；須經DoE認可實驗室測試，並在進口或銷售前在DoE合規認證數據庫中完成登記。多接口GaN充電器可能受DoE多接口外接電源新規約束——請訪問energy.gov/eere核實當前適用情況。（4）加利福尼亞州能源委員會（CEC）註冊——加州第20號令（20 CCR §§ 1601–1608）要求在加州銷售或擬在加州銷售的外接電源須在CEC現代化家電能效數據系統（MAEDbS）中完成註冊；作為美國最大的州級市場，這實際上是消費電子充電器的全國性要求。（5）USB-IF認證——對於採用USB Type-C接口實現USB Power Delivery（USB PD）或可編程電源（PPS）的充電器，USB實施者論壇（USB-IF）根據USB Type-C及USB PD規範提供自願性產品認證；主要零售商（亞馬遜、Best Buy、蘋果授權渠道）和手機OEM廠商合同性要求USB-IF認證，已成為事實上的商業準入門檻。面向移動設備的GaN快充通常帶有USB-IF認證標誌。（6）市場平台合規——亞馬遜和主要美國零售商要求賣家在上架充電器產品前上傳NRTL測試報告、FCC SDoC或FCC ID、DoE合規文件及USB-IF認證；未能提供上述資料將導致產品下架。

standards_or_laws: UL 62368-1 (Safety standard for audio/video, information and communication technology equipment — applicable to USB chargers and power adapters)
47 CFR Part 15 (FCC rules for unintentional and intentional radiators — SDoC / FCC ID)
10 CFR Part 430 Subpart B Appendix Z (DoE Level VI energy efficiency standard for external power supplies)
20 CCR §§ 1601–1608 (California Title 20 — Appliance Efficiency Regulations; CEC MAEDbS registration requirement for external power supplies)
USB Power Delivery Specification Rev. 3.1 (USB-IF) [UNVERIFIED — revision number; verify at usb.org]
USB Type-C Cable and Connector Specification Rev. 2.3 (USB-IF) [UNVERIFIED — revision number; verify at usb.org]

summary.en: In China, consumer chargers (including GaN fast chargers) are subject to China Compulsory Certification (CCC), a single mandatory mark administered by the Certification and Accreditation Administration of China (CNCA) through designated certification bodies (CBs). The applicable CCC standards for chargers/power adapters include GB 4943.1 (safety of information technology equipment, equivalent to IEC 62368-1), GB/T 9254 (EMC), and GB 20943 (energy efficiency). CCC covers product safety testing and factory audits in a single integrated scheme. Once a product holds CCC, it may be sold nationwide. There is no equivalent to the US distributed stack of separate NRTL, FCC, DoE, CEC, and USB-IF requirements. USB-IF certification is not required under Chinese law, though Chinese OEM charger brands voluntarily obtain it for export.
summary.zh: 在中国，消费级充电器（包括GaN快充）须取得中国强制认证（CCC），这是由国家认证认可监督管理委员会（CNCA）通过指定认证机构实施的单一强制性标志。充电器/电源适配器适用的CCC标准包括GB 4943.1（信息技术设备安全，等同于IEC 62368-1）、GB/T 9254（电磁兼容）及GB 20943（能效）。CCC在单一综合体系下涵盖产品安全测试和工厂审查。产品取得CCC后可在全国范围内销售。中国没有对应美国分散体系中独立NRTL、FCC、DoE、CEC及USB-IF要求的等效制度。中国法律不要求USB-IF认证，但中国OEM充电器品牌自愿取得以用于出口。
summary.zht: 在中國，消費級充電器（包括GaN快充）須取得中國強制認證（CCC），這是由國家認證認可監督管理委員會（CNCA）通過指定認證機構實施的單一強制性標誌。充電器/電源適配器適用的CCC標準包括GB 4943.1（資訊技術設備安全，等同於IEC 62368-1）、GB/T 9254（電磁兼容）及GB 20943（能效）。CCC在單一綜合體系下涵蓋產品安全測試和工廠審查。產品取得CCC後可在全國範圍內銷售。中國沒有對應美國分散體系中獨立NRTL、FCC、DoE、CEC及USB-IF要求的等效制度。中國法律不要求USB-IF認證，但中國OEM充電器品牌自願取得以用於出口。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2022 (Safety of information technology equipment — equivalent to IEC 62368-1; replaces GB 4943.1-2011)
GB/T 9254.1-2021 (EMC limits for information technology equipment — Class B)
GB 20943-2013 (Energy efficiency of single-phase external power supply) [UNVERIFIED — verify current edition at samr.gov.cn]

gap.en: The fundamental gap is structural: China operates a single unified CCC mark; the United States has no equivalent single federal mark. A Chinese GaN charger manufacturer must independently satisfy at minimum five separate US requirements — NRTL listing (UL 62368-1), FCC SDoC or FCC ID, DoE Level VI with DoE database enrolment, CEC MAEDbS registration (California), and USB-IF certification (commercially mandatory for USB-C/PD products). CCC does not substitute for any of these. Each requirement involves separate test programmes, separate laboratory accreditations, separate fee structures, and separate renewal timelines. The DoE Level VI efficiency threshold may also be more stringent than GB 20943 for high-wattage multi-port configurations — confirm the applicable DoE test procedure (10 CFR Part 430 Appendix Z or the proposed multi-port rule at energy.gov/eere) before product design finalisation. Amazon and major US marketplace policies add a sixth compliance layer — sellers must upload documentation for all of the above before a product listing is permitted; this is a gating operational requirement independent of the regulatory requirements.
gap.zh: 根本差距在于结构性：中国实行单一统一的CCC标志；美国没有对等的单一联邦标志。中国GaN充电器制造商须独立满足至少五项美国要求——NRTL上市认证（UL 62368-1）、FCC SDoC或FCC ID、DoE VI级要求及DoE数据库登记、CEC MAEDbS注册（加利福尼亚州）以及USB-IF认证（USB-C/PD产品的商业强制要求）。CCC不能替代上述任何要求。每项要求均涉及独立的测试方案、独立的实验室认可、独立的费用结构和独立的续期时间表。对于大功率多接口配置，DoE VI级能效门槛也可能比GB 20943更为严格——在产品设计定型前，请确认适用的DoE测试程序（10 CFR第430部分附录Z或energy.gov/eere上的多接口拟议规则）。亚马逊和主要美国市场平台政策还增加了第六个合规层面——卖家在产品上架前须上传上述所有资料；这是独立于监管要求之外的运营性准入要求。
gap.zht: 根本差距在於結構性：中國實行單一統一的CCC標誌；美國沒有對等的單一聯邦標誌。中國GaN充電器製造商須獨立滿足至少五項美國要求——NRTL上市認證（UL 62368-1）、FCC SDoC或FCC ID、DoE VI級要求及DoE數據庫登記、CEC MAEDbS註冊（加利福尼亞州）以及USB-IF認證（USB-C/PD產品的商業強制要求）。CCC不能替代上述任何要求。每項要求均涉及獨立的測試方案、獨立的實驗室認可、獨立的費用結構和獨立的續期時間表。對於大功率多接口配置，DoE VI級能效門檻也可能比GB 20943更為嚴格——在產品設計定型前，請確認適用的DoE測試程序（10 CFR第430部分附錄Z或energy.gov/eere上的多接口擬議規則）。亞馬遜和主要美國市場平台政策還增加了第六個合規層面——賣家在產品上架前須上傳上述所有資料；這是獨立於監管要求之外的運營性準入要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory: NRTL listing (UL 62368-1), FCC SDoC/FCC ID, DoE Level VI, CEC MAEDbS registration (California). Commercially mandatory: USB-IF certification for USB-C/PD products (retailer/marketplace policy). No single federal safety mark.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory: CCC (single mark covering safety, EMC, energy efficiency). USB-IF certification not required by law.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A GaN fast charger entering the US market from China must clear a distributed five-layer compliance stack — NRTL listing, FCC SDoC, DoE Level VI enrolment, CEC registration, and USB-IF certification — compared with a single CCC mark for domestic China sale. No US equivalent to CCC exists; none of the Chinese certifications transfer. The structural fragmentation of the US system is the primary compliance risk: each layer has distinct timelines, costs, and renewal requirements that must be planned in parallel from the product design stage. For multi-port GaN chargers, the applicability of DoE multi-port efficiency rules should be verified at energy.gov/eere before finalising product specifications. Verify all current standard editions and database enrolment requirements at the respective official sources (ul.com, fcc.gov, energy.gov, energy.ca.gov, usb.org) before any compliance programme is initiated.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 从中国进入美国市场的GaN快充须通过分散的五层合规体系——NRTL上市认证、FCC SDoC、DoE VI级登记、CEC注册及USB-IF认证——而在中国境内销售仅需取得单一CCC标志。美国没有对应CCC的等效制度；中国认证均不可转换。美国体系的结构性分散是主要合规风险：每个层面均有各自独立的时间表、费用和续期要求，须从产品设计阶段起并行规划。对于多接口GaN充电器，应在确定产品规格前访问energy.gov/eere核实DoE多接口能效规则的适用情况。在启动任何合规方案前，请访问各官方来源（ul.com、fcc.gov、energy.gov、energy.ca.gov、usb.org）核实所有现行标准版本及数据库登记要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 從中國進入美國市場的GaN快充須通過分散的五層合規體系——NRTL上市認證、FCC SDoC、DoE VI級登記、CEC註冊及USB-IF認證——而在中國境內銷售僅需取得單一CCC標誌。美國沒有對應CCC的等效制度；中國認證均不可轉換。美國體系的結構性分散是主要合規風險：每個層面均有各自獨立的時間表、費用和續期要求，須從產品設計階段起並行規劃。對於多接口GaN充電器，應在確定產品規格前訪問energy.gov/eere核實DoE多接口能效規則的適用情況。在啟動任何合規方案前，請訪問各官方來源（ul.com、fcc.gov、energy.gov、energy.ca.gov、usb.org）核實所有現行標準版本及數據庫登記要求。

requirement_topic.en: DoE Level VI Energy Efficiency + CEC Title 20 Registration (California)
requirement_topic.zh: DoE VI级能效要求 + CEC第20号令注册（加利福尼亚州）
requirement_topic.zht: DoE VI級能效要求 + CEC第20號令注冊（加利福尼亞州）

summary.en: External power supplies (EPS) sold in the United States must meet the Department of Energy (DoE) Level VI energy efficiency standard under 10 CFR Part 430 Subpart B Appendix Z (effective February 10, 2016). Level VI sets minimum active-mode and no-load power consumption thresholds expressed as functions of nameplate output wattage; at higher wattages (above ~49 W), the active-mode efficiency floor is approximately 89–91%. Products must be tested by a DoE-recognised laboratory using the prescribed test procedure (10 CFR Part 430 Subpart B Appendix Z) and enrolled in the DoE Compliance Certification Database (CCD) at energy.gov before they may be imported into or sold in the United States. The Energy Policy and Conservation Act (EPCA, 42 U.S.C. § 6291 et seq.) authorises DoE to set and enforce these standards; non-compliant EPS may be subject to civil penalties. For GaN chargers with multiple USB ports, the applicability of the current single-port EPS rule versus the proposed multi-port EPS rulemaking must be assessed — as of June 2026 the multi-port rule has not been finalised; verify current status at energy.gov/eere/buildings/appliance-and-equipment-standards-program. Separately, California requires that EPS sold or offered for sale in California be registered in the CEC Modernised Appliance Efficiency Database System (MAEDbS) under Title 20 (20 CCR §§ 1601–1608) before sale. CEC registration requires evidence of DoE Level VI compliance (or an equivalent California-specific efficiency tier if different). As California represents roughly 12% of US consumer electronics retail, CEC registration is a practical prerequisite for any national US retail distribution.
summary.zh: 在美国销售的外接电源（EPS）须符合美国能源部（DoE）依据10 CFR第430部分子部分B附录Z（自2016年2月10日起生效）制定的VI级能效标准。VI级标准以额定输出功率为函数，设定了有源模式和空载功耗的最低门槛；在较高功率（约49W以上），有源模式效率下限约为89–91%。产品须经DoE认可实验室按规定测试程序（10 CFR第430部分子部分B附录Z）测试，并在进口或在美国销售前在DoE合规认证数据库（CCD，energy.gov）中完成登记。《能源政策和节约法》（EPCA，42 U.S.C. § 6291 et seq.）授权DoE制定和执行上述标准；不合规的外接电源可能面临民事处罚。对于配备多个USB接口的GaN充电器，须评估现行单接口外接电源规则与拟议多接口外接电源规则的适用性——截至2026年6月，多接口规则尚未最终确定；请访问energy.gov/eere/buildings/appliance-and-equipment-standards-program核实当前状态。此外，加利福尼亚州要求在加州销售或拟在加州销售的外接电源，须在销售前依据第20号令（20 CCR §§ 1601–1608）在CEC现代化家电能效数据系统（MAEDbS）中完成注册。CEC注册须提供符合DoE VI级要求的证明（或适用的加州特定能效等级，如有差异）。加利福尼亚州约占美国消费电子零售总额的12%，CEC注册是任何全国性美国零售分销的实际前提。
summary.zht: 在美國銷售的外接電源（EPS）須符合美國能源部（DoE）依據10 CFR第430部分子部分B附錄Z（自2016年2月10日起生效）制定的VI級能效標準。VI級標準以額定輸出功率為函數，設定了有源模式和空載功耗的最低門檻；在較高功率（約49W以上），有源模式效率下限約為89–91%。產品須經DoE認可實驗室按規定測試程序（10 CFR第430部分子部分B附錄Z）測試，並在進口或在美國銷售前在DoE合規認證數據庫（CCD，energy.gov）中完成登記。《能源政策和節約法》（EPCA，42 U.S.C. § 6291 et seq.）授權DoE制定和執行上述標準；不合規的外接電源可能面臨民事處罰。對於配備多個USB接口的GaN充電器，須評估現行單接口外接電源規則與擬議多接口外接電源規則的適用性——截至2026年6月，多接口規則尚未最終確定；請訪問energy.gov/eere/buildings/appliance-and-equipment-standards-program核實當前狀態。此外，加利福尼亞州要求在加州銷售或擬在加州銷售的外接電源，須在銷售前依據第20號令（20 CCR §§ 1601–1608）在CEC現代化家電能效數據系統（MAEDbS）中完成注冊。CEC注冊須提供符合DoE VI級要求的證明（或適用的加州特定能效等級，如有差異）。加利福尼亞州約佔美國消費電子零售總額的12%，CEC注冊是任何全國性美國零售分銷的實際前提。

standards_or_laws: 10 CFR Part 430 Subpart B Appendix Z (DoE Level VI test procedure and efficiency standards for external power supplies, effective 2016-02-10)
Energy Policy and Conservation Act (EPCA), 42 U.S.C. § 6291 et seq. (DoE standards authority)
DoE Compliance Certification Database (CCD) — energy.gov (enrolment required before sale)
20 CCR §§ 1601–1608 (California Title 20 Appliance Efficiency Regulations — CEC MAEDbS registration requirement for EPS)
CEC MAEDbS (Modernised Appliance Efficiency Database System) — energy.ca.gov/certifications

summary.en: In China, energy efficiency for consumer power adapters and chargers is governed by GB 20943 (Energy Efficiency Limits and Energy Efficiency Grades of Single-Phase External Power Supply) administered by the State Administration for Market Regulation (SAMR). GB 20943 defines efficiency grades (Grade 1 highest, Grade 3 minimum) and mandates that products sold in China meet at least Grade 3. Energy efficiency labelling under the China Energy Label scheme (GB 7635 series) may apply to certain power supply categories. GB 20943 is a mandatory standard under CCC when applicable product categories are in scope. The Chinese efficiency testing methodology and formula differ from the US DoE Level VI test procedure (10 CFR Part 430 Appendix Z), so products compliant under one regime cannot be assumed compliant under the other without separate testing.
summary.zh: 在中国，消费级电源适配器和充电器的能效受GB 20943（单相外接电源能效限定值及能效等级）约束，由国家市场监督管理总局（SAMR）负责监管。GB 20943定义了能效等级（1级最高，3级最低），要求在中国销售的产品至少达到3级。中国能源标签制度（GB 7635系列）下的能效标签可能适用于特定电源类别。对于纳入CCC目录的适用产品类别，GB 20943是强制性标准。中国能效测试方法和计算公式与美国DoE VI级测试程序（10 CFR第430部分附录Z）不同，因此在一种制度下合规的产品，未经独立测试不能假定在另一种制度下同样合规。
summary.zht: 在中國，消費級電源適配器和充電器的能效受GB 20943（單相外接電源能效限定值及能效等級）約束，由國家市場監督管理總局（SAMR）負責監管。GB 20943定義了能效等級（1級最高，3級最低），要求在中國銷售的產品至少達到3級。中國能源標籤制度（GB 7635系列）下的能效標籤可能適用於特定電源類別。對於納入CCC目錄的適用產品類別，GB 20943是強制性標準。中國能效測試方法和計算公式與美國DoE VI級測試程序（10 CFR第430部分附錄Z）不同，因此在一種制度下合規的產品，未經獨立測試不能假定在另一種制度下同樣合規。

standards_or_laws: GB 20943-2013 (Energy efficiency limits and grades of single-phase external power supply) [UNVERIFIED — verify current edition at samr.gov.cn or gb.standards.com.cn]
CCC mandatory certification (when GB 20943 product category is in CCC scope)
GB 7635 series (China Energy Label scheme) [UNVERIFIED — verify applicability to charger category]

gap.en: GB 20943 compliance and CCC do not satisfy DoE Level VI or CEC Title 20 requirements. Separate US-recognised laboratory testing against the DoE Appendix Z test procedure is required, followed by enrolment in the DoE CCD and CEC MAEDbS registration — these are administrative steps that cannot be completed retroactively after import. For multi-port GaN chargers, the current DoE single-port EPS rule may not capture all ports simultaneously; the proposed multi-port rule, if finalised, could impose stricter combined-load efficiency requirements. The efficiency formula differs between GB 20943 and DoE Level VI — a product meeting GB Grade 1 may or may not meet DoE Level VI at high wattages; this must be verified by test. CEC Title 20 adds a California-specific registration gate with its own database, fee, and renewal cycle; non-registered EPS cannot legally be sold in California even if DoE-compliant. The practical import risk is that US Customs and Border Protection (CBP) can detain shipments of non-DoE-enrolled EPS; CBP enforcement has increased since 2021.
gap.zh: GB 20943合规及CCC不能满足DoE VI级或CEC第20号令要求。须经美国认可实验室按DoE附录Z测试程序独立测试，再完成DoE合规认证数据库（CCD）登记及CEC MAEDbS注册——这些是行政程序，不能在进口后补办。对于多接口GaN充电器，现行DoE单接口外接电源规则可能无法同时涵盖所有接口；若多接口规则最终确定，可能对组合负载能效提出更严格要求。GB 20943与DoE VI级的能效公式不同——在较高功率下，符合GB 1级的产品不一定符合DoE VI级，须经测试验证。CEC第20号令设有加州特定注册门槛，配有独立的数据库、费用和续期周期；即使符合DoE要求，未在CEC注册的外接电源也不得在加州合法销售。实际进口风险在于：美国海关和边境保护局（CBP）可扣押未在DoE登记的外接电源货物；自2021年以来CBP执法力度已有所加强。
gap.zht: GB 20943合規及CCC不能滿足DoE VI級或CEC第20號令要求。須經美國認可實驗室按DoE附錄Z測試程序獨立測試，再完成DoE合規認證數據庫（CCD）登記及CEC MAEDbS注冊——這些是行政程序，不能在進口後補辦。對於多接口GaN充電器，現行DoE單接口外接電源規則可能無法同時涵蓋所有接口；若多接口規則最終確定，可能對組合負載能效提出更嚴格要求。GB 20943與DoE VI級的能效公式不同——在較高功率下，符合GB 1級的產品不一定符合DoE VI級，須經測試驗證。CEC第20號令設有加州特定注冊門檻，配有獨立的數據庫、費用和續期周期；即使符合DoE要求，未在CEC注冊的外接電源也不得在加州合法銷售。實際進口風險在於：美國海關和邊境保護局（CBP）可扣押未在DoE登記的外接電源貨物；自2021年以來CBP執法力度已有所加強。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (federal): DoE Level VI compliance and DoE CCD enrolment required before import or sale in the US. Mandatory (California): CEC MAEDbS registration required before sale in California.
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (when in CCC scope): GB 20943 minimum efficiency grade under CCC. China Energy Label: may apply depending on product category.

source.publisher: U.S. Department of Energy — Office of Energy Efficiency and Renewable Energy (EERE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] DoE Level VI and CEC Title 20 are hard import and sale gates — non-enrolled EPS cannot legally enter US commerce and CBP may detain shipments. GB 20943 compliance does not transfer. Separate DoE-recognised laboratory testing and database enrolment must be completed before shipment. For multi-port GaN chargers, verify the scope of the current single-port EPS rule and the status of the multi-port rulemaking at energy.gov/eere before finalising product configuration. CEC MAEDbS registration is an additional California-specific administrative step with its own timeline and renewal; plan for it in parallel with DoE enrolment, not sequentially. Verify all current efficiency thresholds, test procedures, and database requirements directly at energy.gov and energy.ca.gov before any compliance programme is initiated.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] DoE VI级和CEC第20号令是硬性的进口和销售门槛——未登记的外接电源不得合法进入美国流通，且CBP可能扣押货物。GB 20943合规不可转换。须在发货前完成经DoE认可实验室的测试及数据库登记。对于多接口GaN充电器，在确定产品配置前，请访问energy.gov/eere核实现行单接口外接电源规则的适用范围及多接口规则制定进展。CEC MAEDbS注册是加州特定的额外行政步骤，有其独立的时间表和续期周期；应与DoE登记并行规划，而非按顺序推进。在启动任何合规方案前，请直接访问energy.gov和energy.ca.gov核实所有现行能效门槛、测试程序和数据库要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] DoE VI級和CEC第20號令是硬性的進口和銷售門檻——未登記的外接電源不得合法進入美國流通，且CBP可能扣押貨物。GB 20943合規不可轉換。須在發貨前完成經DoE認可實驗室的測試及數據庫登記。對於多接口GaN充電器，在確定產品配置前，請訪問energy.gov/eere核實現行單接口外接電源規則的適用範圍及多接口規則制定進展。CEC MAEDbS注冊是加州特定的額外行政步驟，有其獨立的時間表和續期周期；應與DoE登記並行規劃，而非按順序推進。在啟動任何合規方案前，請直接訪問energy.gov和energy.ca.gov核實所有現行能效門檻、測試程序和數據庫要求。
